response.justification: While technically excellent with 15+ years of proven engineering leadership and current exposure to AI infrastructure work, the candidate lacks the core qualification this role demands: recognized AI expertise with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI. Career has been primarily full-stack and infrastructure-focused; recent AI work (MCP frameworks, agent infrastructure) is too nascent (1 month) to demonstrate the strategic AI leadership required for a director-level AI strategy position. Missing preferred Master's/PhD in AI field.
strengths: Proven technical leadership at staff/director level with deep full-stack and infrastructure expertise across multiple languages and platforms
Currently building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, showing active engagement with AI systems and agentic frameworks
Strong track record shipping scalable systems (millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby) and setting up CI/CD, containerization, and deployment infrastructure
concerns: No demonstrated AI products, platforms, or published expertise in AI/ML despite 15 years of experience—recent AI infrastructure work is only 1 month old
Career has been generalist full-stack engineering rather than deep specialization in AI, cloud, or ML; lacks the recognized AI thought leadership this director role requires
Missing preferred Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field; no speaking engagements, publications, or leadership in AI strategy or research
